headline: Visa at $326, Mastercard at $493: Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: At $326 and $493, Visa (NYSE:V) and Mastercard (NYSE:MA) screen attractively after a year of underperformance that has reset valuations on two durable franchises in financial services. The card networks earn a small slice on roughly every swipe, tap, and cross-border transaction. Both stocks have sold off since mid-2025 on stablecoin disruption fears, interchange litigation ... Visa at $326, Mastercard at $493: Buy, Sell or Hold?

headline: Prediction: Will SoFi Stock Double This Year?
summary: SoFi Technologies (NASDAQ:SOFI) stock spent much of late 2025 looking like a fintech comeback story before giving back gains in 2026. Doubling from current levels would require a move to roughly $36.44, well above the 52-week high of $32.73. Our model says that is a stretch in the next 12 months, even with the bull ... Prediction: Will SoFi Stock Double This Year?

headline: KuCoin’s KuCard Launch in Australia Brings Crypto Closer to Everyday Payments
summary: KuCoin launched KuCard in Australia on Mastercard’s global network, giving eligible users access to crypto-backed card payments, Google Pay, and real-world spending.

headline: Qantas, Oatly and Kingspan Executives Join Sustainability LIVE Leadership Summit at London Climate Action Week
summary: London, 01 June 2026 – Sustainability LIVE: The Leadership Summit has announced five new senior sustainability executives joining the speaker line-up at London Climate Action Week on 25 June. The announcement comes as the event prepares to convene global leaders to address critical climate challenges and explore innovative solutions for a sustainable future. headline: Mastercard (NYSE:MA) Passes the 'Caviar Cruise' Quality Screen with Exceptional Financial Marks
summary: Mastercard (MA) passes the "Caviar Cruise" quality investing screen, showing exceptional profitability, low debt, and strong revenue growth—ideal for long-term buy-and-hold strategies.
